name: pluxx
description: Build once, ship installable plugins to Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Build once, ship installable plugins to Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode
interface.longDescription: Use Pluxx to import MCPs or migrate existing plugins, prepare richer context, validate and refine the scaffold, then build, verify, and publish installable plugins for Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode from one maintained source project.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluxx to import or migrate this plugin into a maintained Pluxx project and validate the first pass.
Use Pluxx to prepare context for this scaffold, refine the taxonomy and instructions, then rerun validation safely.
Use Pluxx to build, verify, and publish installable plugins for Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode.
